compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
The end-to-end demonstrator, and removal of the contradictory stub.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] An end-to-end code_review example (scripted -> agent -> gate(unsecured) -> comment), snapshot-tested with pinned system-prompt scaffolding.
- [ ] LangflowRunner REST stub removed; langflow runner derivation dropped from config.
Files: src/rebar/llm/runner.py, src/rebar/llm/config.py, .rebar/workflows/
compiled_state.title: WS-K3: code_review example workflow + retire LangflowRunner
